-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

Hi,

This update includes a shlib bump. Therefore we need to bump ports which
depends on bsdconv. Could you please review and approve this patch:
http://people.freebsd.org/~beat/patches/138750-bsdconv-shlib-bump.patch

Thanks,
Beat

- --
